The critical case is when `url()` appears without quotes around the data URI—the parser would need to correctly identify where the URL ends, especially when the SVG content inside contains braces or other special characters that could be mistaken for CSS syntax. PUK { is what wasn't closed. The block has an opening brace after `__AcPUK`, so depth should be 1, then it hits `url('` and enters string literal mode to skip everything until the closing quote.
